author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(url): base createURL on UiState instead of SearchParameters (#5696)
body:
* chore(bundlesize): update margins

* fix(routing): take initial UI state in account if widgets aren't yet mounted

* feat(routing): allow createURL with IndexUiState callback

* fix(refinementList): use UiState based routing

* fix(pagination): use UiState based routing

* fix(breadcrumb): use UiState based routing

* test(routing): use router in tests

* test(common): add tests for createURL for several widgets (#5694)

* test(common): add tests for createURL for several widgets

* use lambda for connectHierarchicalMenu

* add test with initial URL

* test(url): add common tests with multiple widgets

FX-2450

* fix(rendering): render if status has changed

* test(url): introduce 'skippable' describe

this is useful for currentrefinements which works but with a warning/error and not completely right for the first render in react instantsearch hooks

* !fixup
